title: Storytelling & Sequencing Flashcards
tagline: Five-card stories that help children put ideas in order.
description: Children arrange picture cards into meaningful sequences, narrate what happened and imagine what could happen next. Familiar daily-life and nature themes make storytelling easier to understand, while the flip-and-check format provides helpful guidance.
benefits: Helps children tell stories and organise ideas clearly
Strengthens logical thinking, sequencing and prediction
Builds vocabulary, comprehension and empathy through visual stories

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Daily routines, hygiene, creativity, responsibility, food chains and plant and animal life cycles.
